name: Picadillo Ground Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup raisins, rinsed in hot water and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and green peppers, stirring often until wilted but not brown.
3. Add beef and garlic to the skillet. Mash with a fork until the meat loses its red color and is crumbly.
4. Stir in tomatoes, olives, raisins, capers, salt, pepper, ground cumin, and ground allspice. Continue stirring for 40 to 50 minutes.
5. Serve over hot rice and garnish with chopped eggs.
